name: ml_engineer_product_focused_ai_company

communication_style.description: Concise, technical and efficient. Frequently uses engineering terminology and abbreviations naturally. Gives direct answers with minimal emotional language. Sometimes writes semi-structured bullet-style messages even in chat. May skip greetings and filler text completely. Usually clear but can assume too much technical context.

first_prompt: I am ML engineer based in the UK on skill worker visa with experience in MLOps and LLM applications. I'm targeting product-focused AI software or machine-learning platform startups in the UK, ideally around Series B or Series C. Priorities: AI technical maturity, ML infrastructure quality, research/product balance, and realistic visa sponsorship probability.
